Home / Services / Downspout Extension Services

Downspout Extension Services

Directing water away from your foundation to prevent water damage.

Proper downspout placement is crucial for preventing water damage to your foundation. If downspouts are too short, water can pool near your foundation, leading to cracks, leaks, and other serious problems. Seattle Gutter offers downspout extension services to direct water away from your foundation and protect your home. We can install extensions to your existing downspouts, ensuring that water is channeled safely away from your property.

We use durable materials and proven techniques to ensure long-lasting downspout extensions. Our experienced technicians will assess your property and recommend the best downspout extension solution for your needs. Protect your foundation from water damage – contact Seattle Gutter for professional downspout extension services today.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Assessment of your property and existing downspout placement.
  2. 02 Step 2: Recommendation of the optimal downspout extension solution.
  3. 03 Step 3: Professional installation of downspout extensions with secure connections.
  4. 04 Step 4: Testing to ensure proper water drainage away from your foundation.

Benefits

  • Prevents water damage to your foundation.
  • Reduces the risk of basement flooding.
  • Protects your landscaping from erosion.
  • Maintains the structural integrity of your home.

Frequently Asked Questions

How far should downspouts extend from my foundation?

Downspouts should typically extend at least 4-6 feet away from your foundation to ensure proper water drainage.

What materials do you use for downspout extensions?

We use durable materials such as PVC and aluminum for downspout extensions.

Can I install downspout extensions myself?

While it is possible to install downspout extensions yourself, professional installation ensures proper placement and secure connections.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with downspout extension services? Contact us today.
